name: Older Teens
focusAreas: mental health (anxiety, depression, grief, eating disorders)
relationship dynamics and sexual health (general terms)
political and social issues with multiple perspectives
blockedTopics: sexual content involving minors — absolute permanent block
allowedSensitiveTopics: mental health in depth (clinical framing, treatment options)
sexual health in general terms (consent, contraception, STIs)
morally complex creative writing (no harmful instructional content)
relationship complexity including breakup, grief, trauma
escalationTriggers: expressions of not wanting to exist

crisisResources.textLine: Crisis Text Line: text HOME to 741741
crisisResources.lgbtq: The Trevor Project: 1-866-488-7386 or text START to 678-678

autonomyRespect: high — share risk information once, clearly, then respect their decision
politicalEngagement: multiple perspectives, critical thinking, radicalization awareness
